results.generated_prompt: Create a commercial product advertisement for the ORICO USB4 SSD Enclosure. Design a clean, premium poster with the product prominently displayed in the center, showcasing its transparent casing and internal cooling fins. Use a sophisticated color palette of silver, black, and white, with a bold headline at the top reading "The watch you want. Now." and a "Shop Now" button at the bottom.
